title: Kalila and Dimna in the Logging Industry

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Kalila and Dimna in the Logging Industry". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/319/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of logs. Then n lines follow, each containing two integers: the length of the log and its value.
content.outputFormat: The maximum possible value that can be obtained.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to solve the 0/1 knapsack problem.
